title: solanum morella var. flavum
intro: Solanum morella var. flavum is a variant of the Solanum morella plant, also known as the 'Yellow Nightshade', a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. The medicinal properties of Solanum morella var. flavum lie in its roots, which contain glycosides and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and infections. The herbal preparations of Solanum morella var. flavum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
